mapper.select: select count(*) from sys_user where name like concat(#{keyword}, '%')
select count(*) from sys_user where status = #{keyword}
select count(*) from sys_user where role = #{keyword}
select id, account, name, role, status, created_date from sys_user limit #{start}, #{end}
select id, account, password, name, role, status, created_date from sys_user where account = #{keyword}
select id, account, name, role, status, created_date from sys_user where name like concat(#{keyword}, '%') limit #{start}, #{end}
select id, account, name, role, status, created_date from sys_user where status = #{keyword} limit #{start}, #{end}
select id, account, name, role, status, created_date from sys_user where role = #{keyword} limit #{start}, #{end}
mapper.insert: insert into sys_user (account, name, password, role, status, created_date) values (#{account}, #{name}, #{password}, #{role}, 'ACTIVE', now())
